text_block_list.text:
Today marks the halfway point for the 
summer training camp. For our hard 
working horsegirls, it's a well earned 
day of rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Miss Stego. Now, en garde～

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Ohh! Haha, close one, close one.
(Bashun! Bashun!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Funnnnngyyaaaaaa!! I～～ am～～ so～～ gone～～!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: My bad you two. Victory is for my taking!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Don't be going all smug on me now…!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
I'll avenge Fukukitaru and my dears! 
It's show～～time!!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Haha. If that's the case, then I'd love to see you try.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: How about this water bullet! Pew, peww!!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hey hey, we're doing three on one now～? ……Woah!

Stay Gold is battling against the others 
in a water gun battle. Despite her typical 
aloof state, she seems to be more 
upbeat than usual today.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Ahahahaha. Ahhh, I'm wet all the way down to my tail. Hey, that towel over there —

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …Hm? What's up?
choice_data_list: Nah, you seem more upbeat than usual

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Haha, is that so. Well, you might be right.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Curiously, my heart feels as if it's dancing. 
Maybe it's the mystique of summer—

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…or maybe it's because those guys 
are my opponents.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Stego! Hurryyy! It's time for round two!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Ahh, gimme a second.

After roughly drying herself off with 
the towel, Stay Gold dashed back to 
join her friends.
choice_data_list: (She really seems to be enjoying herself)
(She really seems to be enjoying herself)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That's right, Stego, are you joining the 
orienteering session this afternoon?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh that elective activity? I haven't 
really decided yet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
So… If it's alright with you, would you 
like to join my team with Air Groove?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Aren't you the outdoorsey type? I want to 
see your skills in action and… I thought 
this would also be a great chance to be 
able to converse with you.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh! If that's the case then I wanna invite you! Come on to my team with Pearl! I still wanna play with you some more Stego!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Well then, what should I do now? There's 
only one of me in the end hey.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Fufu, whatever team will you pick, I'm so excited! Let your heart decide where your destination shall be!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …I see. Let me think about it for a sec.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
—So that's how I got invited to both teams. 
They all seem kinda fun though…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Say if it was you, which would you choose?
choice_data_list: The stable Dober and Air Groove

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I reckon if I get on their 
vibe, it'll definitely be a lot of fun!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Moo～ The map is soo confusing! Which road is the correct one?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Orienteering is all about passing through checkpoints, so taking any route is OK! So, feeling out your route is the "correct" way!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it's just as Pearl says. We're the 
ones who decide which path is the 
right one.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I got it! So feeling is very important!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
The footsteps… all seem to be on the 
left side. Right side it is then.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Say, let's go that way. Don't you 
reckon the path less taken is the 
more interesting one?

text_block_list.name: Taiki & Pearl
text_block_list.text: —Okay! —OK!

While I waited at the goal of the orienteering 
activity, Stay Gold showed up at the finish 
with her friends.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
That's a good choice. If it's with those 
two, I know that they've got my back.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look at that. There's a squirrel 
up there cleaning itself.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Seems like there's a lot going on 
around here. Alrighty, I'm gonna 
look around a little.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Eh? Are you sure it's alright to not continue forward…?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Detours are important y'know? There 
are some sights you'd only get the 
chance to see right here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: W-W-What should we do, Air Groove…?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I don't mind at all. Besides, this 
orienteering activity's purpose was 
meant for us to refresh and connect 
with nature anyway.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We can just claim back the time we lost. 
Why don't you also take a look around 
with Stego?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: …I… See. Uhm… Then I want you to join us too!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Heeey, get over here guys. There's a tanuki here, a tanuki.

While I waited at the goal of the orienteering 
activity, Stay Gold showed up at the finish 
with her friends.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Mmm… Gwahh～～
choice_data_list: You look like you had fun
You look like you had fun

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …Ahh, of course. It's because I had great companions.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Hey! Stego～～!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: They're handing out juice over here～～!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Oh. Since when did they all gather together. Heyyy, I'm coming now.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. Why don't you tag along? 
"To us, who are present here and now," 
this is the only time you'll ever get to 
experience this moment.

So, Stay Gold was able to have a 
refreshing day off ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
—Oh yeah, Air Groove, do you know 
what's been up with Suzuka? I haven't 
seen her all day today.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
…If it's Suzuka, I suspect she's doing her 
own independent training. I've already 
advised her to rest, yet it seems my 
words have fallen upon deaf ears…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …Was anything off about her?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
…Yes. Not only today, but her concentration 
recently has only been growing at a 
staggering rate.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
——She seems to have grasped onto 
something. Something that would 
change her running from now on.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff… Huff… Huff……

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
……Further… I can definitely… Go 
even further……

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ——————Beyond that light.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ……Changing how she runs huh.
